title: The mind is a fire: I rebuilt my homepage as a living map of everything I've written
author: Zachary Proser
description: My old homepage centered a photo of my face. The new one is the Mind on Fire mark alive over my entire corpus — every essay a star, clustered by topic, hover to preview, click to read, and fire rising off the crown. Here's what it is, how it works, and why I built it.
